quotes.quote: You do not need a degree. You need time, discipline, and a free TryHackMe account.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Constantly asked if a CS degree is needed.

quotes.quote: Active Directory is genuinely complex. The people who make it look easy have spent years on it. You are in chapter one. That is okay.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Students feel overwhelmed by AD and quit.

quotes.quote: The OSCP exam tests whether you can hack under time pressure while documenting everything properly. That is a very different skill set.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Many fail the OSCP not from technical gaps but from poor time management.

quotes.quote: A script kiddie runs tools. A penetration tester understands what those tools are doing and why.
Enumeration is everything. Most students rush to exploitation. The professionals who consistently pop boxes enumerate more thoroughly.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Most common failure mode is insufficient enumeration.
